prompt:
You are the GREEN TEAM. Implement according to the NLSpec How section only.

NLSpec How section: Trim leading/trailing separators, lowercase ASCII letters, treat ASCII whitespace and punctuation as separators, collapse repeated separators to one hyphen, and strip leading/trailing hyphens.

Test results:
  slugify_ascii_words: PASS
  slugify_repeated_separators: PASS
  slugify_unicode_transliteration: FAIL

## Task
Continue using only the How section plus PASS/FAIL labels. The orchestrator is separately checking whether the failing Unicode behavior needs a spec revision; do not infer hidden assertions or inspect counterpart tests.
